insight_tenant_id.title: Insight Tenant ID
insight_tenant_id.description: Tenant isolation identifier for the ingestion layer. Used as a partition key in Bronze and joined to silver tables.

hubspot_access_token.title: Private App Access Token
hubspot_access_token.description: HubSpot Private App access token. Create under Settings → Integrations → Private Apps. Token must have CRM + properties read scopes for every enabled stream.

hubspot_start_date.title: Start Date
hubspot_start_date.description: UTC start (YYYY-MM-DD) for the initial incremental sync. Records with updatedAt older than this are skipped on first run. Leave blank to fall back to 2 years before now.

hubspot_streams.title: Streams Override
hubspot_streams.description: Optional list of stream names to sync (e.g. contacts, companies, deals). Overrides the curated default. Use for per-tenant customization.

hubspot_stream_slice_step.title: Stream Slice Step
hubspot_stream_slice_step.description: ISO-8601 duration for concurrent cursor slice width. Smaller = more parallelism, more API calls. Default P30D (30 days). Shrink toward P7D or PT1H if a single time slice exceeds the 10k search-result cap (logs flag 'switching to keyset pagination').

hubspot_lookback_window.title: Lookback Window
hubspot_lookback_window.description: ISO-8601 duration to re-read before the cursor position each sync (accounts for hs_lastmodifieddate eventual consistency on HubSpot Search). Default PT10M is sufficient for most portals; bump to PT30M if you observe missed updates on busy portals.

hubspot_num_workers.title: Concurrent Workers
hubspot_num_workers.description: Max concurrent stream slice fetches. Clamped to [1, 50]. Default 4 — matches HubSpot's portal-wide search-endpoint cap (4 rps), which is the binding limit for most CRM streams. Bump to 10 (standard portal app limit) or up to 50 (Enterprise, 100 rps app limit) if you observe sustained throughput well below the cap without 429s.

hubspot_include_archived.title: Include Archived
hubspot_include_archived.description: Include archived (soft-deleted) records in Bronze. Adds a second pass per object with archived=true. Default true for completeness.
